title: Vibrant Charred Peruvian Sevaiiya Noodles
description: A one-pot Peruvian dish featuring charred sevaiiya noodles, pickle, and dairy-free friendly ingredients, this recipe combines the flavors of Peru with the comfort of noodles. It is a bouncy and qq textured dish with a smoky char.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large one-pot skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced red onion and cook until it starts to caramelize.
Add sliced aji amarillo pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add sevaiiya noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with onion and pepper mixture.
Char the noodles by cooking for an additional 2 minutes without stirring.
Stir in soy sauce, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add chopped pickle to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes or until the noodles are cooked through.
Stir in chopped cilantro and serve hot.
